## 📊 Review Criteria

- [ ] Dart analyze passes (`dart analyze lib/features/list_contract/`)
- [ ] No hardcoded Vietnamese strings in .dart files
- [ ] All API calls go through `ListContractService`
- [ ] Provider uses state machine (loading → loaded/error/noData)
- [ ] Search debounce 500ms implemented
- [ ] Load more on scroll-to-bottom implemented
- [ ] Pull-to-refresh implemented
- [ ] Filter BottomSheet with combined params working
